---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? If so, please describe the problem.**
A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve.

**Is your feature request related to a specific existing implementation?**
Please describe the existing implementation and how your feature would improve it.

**Describe the feature you want**
A detailed description of what you want to implement.

**Additional context**
Add any additional context or screenshots when proposing a feature.
